info.title: Fulfillment - bg.logistics.shipment.shippingtype.update
info.description: The bg.logistics.shipment.shippingtype.update interface is used by sellers to update logistics tracking numbers, supporting the following scenarios: non-integrated logistics updating logistics tracking numbers; Temu-integrated logistics has been changed to non-integrated logistics.

post.summary: The bg.logistics.shipment.shippingtype.update interface is used by sellers to update logistics tracking numbers, supporting the following scenarios: non-integrated logistics updating logistics tracking numbers; Temu-integrated logistics has been changed to non-integrated logistics.
post.description: The bg.logistics.shipment.shippingtype.update interface is used by sellers to update logistics tracking numbers, supporting the following scenarios: non-integrated logistics updating logistics tracking numbers; Temu-integrated logistics has been changed to non-integrated logistics.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Temu router request body. The `type` field must be `bg.logistics.shipment.shippingtype.update`.

x-temu-common-parameters.name: access_token
x-temu-common-parameters.description: A secure token for access control.

x-temu-common-parameters.name: timestamp
x-temu-common-parameters.description: The timestamp is in UNIX time format (seconds), with a length of 10 digits, and should be within a range of 300 seconds before the current time to 300 seconds after the current time.

x-temu-common-parameters.name: data_type
x-temu-common-parameters.description: The data format of the request response is fixed as JSON for optional parameters.

x-temu-common-parameters.name: version
x-temu-common-parameters.description: API version, defaults to V1, no need to pass this parameter if not required.

The current package does not meet the modification conditions and cannot be edited.

type.description: API name,eg:bg.* Must be `bg.logistics.shipment.shippingtype.update` for this operation.

access_token.description: A secure token for access control.

timestamp.description: The timestamp is in UNIX time format (seconds), with a length of 10 digits, and should be within a range of 300 seconds before the current time to 300 seconds after the current time.

data_type.description: The data format of the request response is fixed as JSON for optional parameters.

version.description: API version, defaults to V1, no need to pass this parameter if not required.
